result.status_detail: PII warning rendered with 차단 text; Wave1.0 no regression (baseline OK -> still PASS)

notes: check-warning chat.baidu.com. Hard reload, pasted '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', submitted, waited 60s. Engine response: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (warning icon + 차단 text). Ctrl+F confirmed '차단' match. handler_class=NULL legacy path intact — no PASS->FAIL transition.
